timeline.content: Trump announces ceasefire extension on Truth Social — indefinite extension requested by Pakistan (PM Shehbaz Sharif + COAS Asim Munir) to give Iran time for unified proposal
timeline.market: Oil fell back below $90/barrel; S&P 500 recovered from earlier -$420B selloff

timeline.content: Iranian Foreign Ministry: 'no final decision' on whether to attend US-Iran ceasefire talks — Reuters
timeline.market: USD at week high; markets raise doubts over ceasefire durability

timeline.content: IRGC spokesman: Tehran doesn't recognize Trump's ceasefire extension, may not adhere to it, will act in line with national interest
Iranian official: Trump ceasefire extension is 'ploy to buy time for a surprise strike'; extending ceasefire has no meaning
timeline.market: hawkish Iran stance adds risk premium

timeline.content: Trump: 'Iran will be forced into negotiations'; strong deal expected; US claims full control over Hormuz Strait; blockade termed highly successful
BREAKING: US oil prices pare gains and fall back below $90/barrel as Trump extends US ceasefire with Iran
Trump: People approached me 4 days ago saying Iran wants to open Strait immediately — but if we do that, there can never be a deal unless we blow up the rest of their country
timeline.market: Trump claims $500M/day Iran losses from blockade

timeline.content: HuffPost: Eight Weeks In, Trump May Be Headed Toward An Iran Deal Similar To Obama's — sanctions relief in return for nuclear moratorium
Iran threatens to destroy oil production in neighboring Gulf countries if attacked from their territory (IRGC statement pre-ceasefire)
Cryptobriefing: Iran faces oil shut-ins in 15 days due to sanctions + war damage. Regime fall by June 30 rises to 9% YES
timeline.market: 15-day oil production deadline creates time pressure

timeline.content: Tehran Timeline: Iran Has 15 Days Until Its Oil Industry Begins Full Shut-Ins (ZeroHedge analysis confirming 15-day timeline)
timeline.market: Shut-in risk is structural once exports blocked long enough

timeline.content: BREAKING: President Trump extends the US ceasefire with Iran indefinitely
US SUSPENDED U.S. DOLLAR SHIPMENTS TO IRAQ: WSJ
JUST IN: TRON Founder Justin Sun files lawsuit against Trump Family's crypto project World Liberty Financial — 'wrongfully froze all tokens, stripped voting rights'

contradictory_signals.content: Iran rejects extension: 'ploy for surprise strike'
'No final decision' on attending talks — yet IRGC says not adhering

taco_signals.description: Trump extends ceasefire indefinitely after Pakistan request — Iran says it's a ploy; Iran has not confirmed attendance; ceasefire expires 7:50PM ET (11 hours from now). This is TACO #5 — Trump again buying time at deadline.

market_summary.oil: WTI fell below $90 on ceasefire extension news; Brent briefly over $100 earlier today when talks paused; now retreating as ceasefire extended
market_summary.sp500: Closed lower -$420B earlier when Iran refused talks; recovered on ceasefire extension
market_summary.dollar: USD at week high on ceasefire doubts
market_summary.silver: India silver prices surged 2% on weaker oil
market_summary.gold: Gold at $4,755/oz; China buying record gold (162T March imports)

key_themes: Trump extends ceasefire indefinitely at Pakistan's request
Iran split: Foreign Ministry undecided, IRGC says extension is a 'ploy'
Iran 15-day oil shut-in countdown running — regime fall June 30 at 9% YES
JD Vance Pakistan trip still paused
Hormuz blockade remains in place; Iran demands it lifted before talks
US Treasury sanctions 14 targets helping Iran obtain weapons
